title: Do Shut Up
description: England’s classic, longest-running series about a hard-drinking, yet loving family of soccer hooligans.
quote: You gave me a smash on the noggin” last year!
altHero: two guys in a living room at Christmas drinking two huge glasses of beer
alt1: hands hold up a beer bottle with a red bow on it
alt2: one guy smashing the other guy on the head with the beer bottle
alt3: an old lady with a bonnet over curlers and two oven mitts on
alt4: two guys holding up wooden paddles at the old woman
